'''zhasufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachnophobic|arachnophobic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachnophobic|arachnophobic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhasufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || zhæsifith || zhæsifij || zhæsifish || zhæsifi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || zhasusufuth || zhasusufuj || zhasusufush || zhasusufu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || zhasufuth || zhasufuj || zhasufush || zhasufu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || zhasuffufth || zhasuffufj || zhasuffufsh || zhasuffuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || zhasufuthu || zhasufuju || zhasufushu || zhasufuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || zhasufuth || zhasufuj || zhasufush || zhasufu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || zhasufuthul || zhasufujul || zhasufushul || zhasufukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || zhasufuuthuthu || zhasufuujuju || zhasufuushushu || zhasufuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || zhasufuthun || zhasufujun || zhasufushun || zhasufukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || zhasufuthuoro || zhasufujuoro || zhasufushuoro || zhasufukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
